      • newUndefined(): AMF0Value

Types

AMF0Type = enum
  AMF0_Number = 0, AMF0_Boolean = 1, AMF0_String = 2, AMF0_Object = 3,
  AMF0_Null = 5, AMF0_Undefined = 6, AMF0_ECMAArray = 8, AMF0_StrictArray = 10,
  AMF0_LongString = 12
AMF0 data types as defined in the RTMP specification. Used for encoding/decoding action message payloads. 
AMF0Value = ref object
  case typ*: AMF0Type        ## The type of the AMF0 value, determines which field is valid.
  of AMF0_Number:
    num*: float64            ## For AMF0_Number type, holds the numeric value.
  of AMF0_Boolean:
    b*: bool                 ## For AMF0_Boolean type, holds the boolean value.
  of AMF0_String, AMF0_LongString:
    s*: string               ## For AMF0_String and AMF0_LongString types, holds the string value.
  of AMF0_Object, AMF0_ECMAArray:
    obj*: Table[string, AMF0Value] ## For AMF0_Object and AMF0_ECMAArray types, holds a table of key-value pairs.
  of AMF0_StrictArray:
    arr*: seq[AMF0Value]     ## For AMF0_StrictArray type, holds a sequence of AMF0 values.
  of AMF0_Null, AMF0_Undefined:
    nil
Represents a value encoded in AMF0 format, used for RTMP action messages.

Procs

proc amf0ToStr(v: AMF0Value): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Converts an AMF0Value to a human-readable string for debugging purposes. Complex types are summarized as "<complex>". 
proc amfObj(pairs: openArray[(string, AMF0Value)]): AMF0Value {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc decodeAllAMF0(data: seq[byte]): seq[AMF0Value] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc decodeAllAMF0Ptr(data: ptr byte; dataLen: int): seq[AMF0Value] {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Decodes a sequence of AMF0 values from a raw byte pointer and length, returning a sequence of AMF0Value. Uses ByteReader for zero-copy parsing. 
proc decodeAllAMF0Seq(data: seq[byte]): seq[AMF0Value] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc decodeOneAMF0(data: seq[byte]; idx: var int): AMF0Value {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc decodeOneAMF0(r: var ByteReader): AMF0Value {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc encodeAMF0Values(vals: seq[AMF0Value]): seq[byte] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Encodes a sequence of AMF0Value into a byte sequence suitable for RTMP action message payloads. 
proc encodeOneAMF0(v: AMF0Value; outSeq: var seq[byte]) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Encodes a single AMF0Value into the provided byte sequence. Handles all AMF0 types according to the specification. 
proc newBoolean(v: bool): AMF0Value {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc newEcmaArray(): AMF0Value {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc newNull(): AMF0Value {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc newNumber(v: float64): AMF0Value {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc newObject(): AMF0Value {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc newStrictArray(items: seq[AMF0Value]): AMF0Value {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc newString(v: string): AMF0Value {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
